requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3, ADR Rail/Road Corridor, and Kazakhstan Import Routing
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3、欧亚铁路/公路通道与哈萨克斯坦清关
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3、歐亞鐵路/公路走廊與哈薩克斯坦清關

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks exported from China to Kazakhstan require valid UN 38.3 test basis for dangerous-goods transport. Kazakhstan logistics is generally landlocked with rail and road movements, and shipments should match correct UN numbers, packing group limits, marking, and multimodal documentation from consignee to transport mode in each leg. Air shipments should additionally align with IATA and ICAO dangerous-goods requirements for state-of-charge and sectioning.
summary.zh: 中国出口至哈萨克斯坦的锂电池与移动电源须使用UN 38.3测试结果作为危险品运输依据。哈萨克斯坦通常为内陆目的地，以铁路和公路为主，货物需在各运输段匹配正确的UN编号、包装限值、标识与多式联运文件。空运时还需按IATA与ICAO危险品规定控制荷电状态与分舱方式。
summary.zht: 中國出口至哈薩克斯坦之鋰電池與行動電源須使用UN 38.3測試結果作為危險品運輸依據。哈薩克斯坦通常為內陸目的地，以鐵路和公路為主，貨物需在各運輸段匹配正確的UN編號、包裝限值、標識與多式聯運文件。空運時還需按IATA與ICAO危險品規定控制荷電狀態與分艙方式。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, 38.3 — Lithium batteries
ADR 2023 Class 9 dangerous goods transport provisions for road transport
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations — air transport requirements
ICAO Technical Instructions for the safe transport of dangerous goods by air

summary.en: China already applies UN 38.3 and dangerous-goods documentation in many export scenarios. Those are still needed for Kazakhstan shipments, but they must be aligned to Kazakhstan routing, road leg declarations, and consignee-side interpretation. Mismatches in charge state, unit configuration, or package marks can block transport clearances.
summary.zh: 中国在多数出口场景下已执行UN 38.3和危险品文件要求。这些文件仍是必要条件，但对哈萨克斯坦还需按其运输走廊、陆路环节申报和收货方解释进行再对齐。荷电状态、单元配置或包装标识不一致都可能导致运输阻滞。
summary.zht: 中國在大多數出口場景下已執行UN 38.3與危險品文件要求。這些文件仍是必要條件，但對哈薩克斯坦還需按其運輸走廊、陸路環節報關及收貨方解讀進行再對齊。荷電狀態、單元配置或包裝標識不一致都可能導致運輸阻滯。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and test summary
China dangerous-goods transport documentation for lithium batteries
Air and road carrier documentary rules where used

gap.en: The gap is usually one of route-specific evidence quality rather than legal absence. CN documentation for one configuration may not cover the exact Kazakhstan rail/road lot design, unit state of charge policy, or consignee transport declarations. Import and logistics teams should validate each shipment against UN 38.3 scope, ADR-compatible labeling, and local carrier document acceptance.
gap.zh: 常见差距在于路线特定证据质量，而非法律缺位。中国某一配置的文件可能不覆盖哈萨克斯坦实际的铁路/公路批次、荷电状态策略或收货方的运输申报。进口和物流团队应按UN 38.3范围、ADR兼容标识及本地承运人文件验收逐票核对。
gap.zht: 常見差距在於路線特定證據品質，而非法規缺位。中國某一配置的文件可能不覆蓋哈薩克斯坦實際的鐵路/公路批次、荷電狀態策略或收貨方的運輸申報。進口及物流團隊應按UN 38.3範圍、ADR兼容標識及本地承運人文件驗收逐票核對。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for dangerous-goods transport globally and for Kazakhstan rail/road entry logistics where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for lithium battery export logistics where dangerous-goods rules apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 remains mandatory across transport modes, and Kazakhstan-bound rail/road flows add documentation discipline risks at each transfer point. CN reports are valuable but do not remove the requirement for route-specific ADR and consignee-side transport alignment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3在各运输方式下持续适用，面向哈萨克斯坦的铁路和公路流向会在每个转运点增加文件一致性要求。中国报告有用，但不能替代针对路由的ADR和收货方运输对齐义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3在各運輸方式下持續適用，面向哈薩克斯坦的鐵路和公路流向會在每個轉運點增加文件一致性要求。中國報告有用，但不能替代針對路由的ADR與收貨方運輸對齊義務。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)
